title: Not free
review: 10 minutes of questions only to learn it’s a free trial.  State that upfront and don’t waste my time

title: How much?
review: I dislike apps that approach with a free trial…are you sure…. Are you really sure…. Really, really sure…without giving a price.  I don’t go to the end.

title: Scam structure, didn’t reveal the cost of the services until very end
review: I absolutely cannot stand when apps take the consumer through several long steps of set up and profile building just to reveal that there is no free option in order to use the app. It is not hard to put the cost of the app right in the App Store instead of scamming people into making an account when they didn’t even know the cost! Very annoying, 1 star

title: actually helpful
review: got this app & the free trial randomly & it actually is helpful. it seems like its definitely worth the investment. the app genuinely wants to help you improve. The insights & different avenues they “judge” you on are extremely detailed and informative. If I had the money I’d absolutely continue to

title: How it’s been going
review: I honestly just started yesterday, but I’m really enjoying it. I don’t feel rushed or judged at all. Things are going pretty smooth and hopefully I started to improve on my speech soon.

title: Seems good
review: I havnt started yet but it seems to offer what I need

title: Pulls you in
review:
This app is great at two things. One, helping you learn by focusing on the areas you need to improve. And two, showing you your progress over time.

Been using it for 14 days straight now and it’s easily becoming part of my morning routine. Very helpful

I feel like a better speaker overall. And way more confident in on-the-spot situations

title: Such an awesome app
review: I had trouble with my speaking skills and have definitely seen such a good improvement. App is ridiculously easy to navigate and I’m getting better at speaking

title: Long setup just for paywall.
review: Just tried out the app, it gave me a long setup process just to give me a trial paywall. Not free at all.

title: Wellspoken
review: Wonderful exercises for strengthening articulation. Highly recommended…

title: Where is articulation practice
review: If the app is called an articulation app, where is the actual articulation improvement feature? It seems to focus more on English, vocabulary, and general communication skills.

title: Day 1
review: Wellspoken is an innovative app, but it doesn’t replace a professional speech coach. I appreciate the detail feedback the app provides because it shows me exactly where I need to improve.  But if an app user doesn’t know how to apply what the app is advising long-term improvement most likely will not occur. However, a live speaking coach can explain and demonstrates how to utilize on a personal level by building on your skillset rather than a generalized skillset.  So, if you want exponential and long term growth hire a speaking coach as well as the app.

title: Useless
review: Complete scam

title: Shady charging habits
review: One of those apps where if you sign up for a membership and don’t have enough money on the billing date they force you to keep the membership and credit a debt on your Apple account instead of just ending the premium membership.

title: Progress
review: I’ve only been using this app for a week and I already see the difference in my speech. It’s giving me structure and confidence!

title: Careful with subscriptions
review: Didn’t read much while doing the 7 day trial. Unfortunately forgot to cancel, only to find myself charged for the full year. Usually any other app allow to cancel and credit you the rest, not this one. Scam… be careful!!

title: An amazing ap for an amazing price
review: Seriously they care about you and that’s a problem with these big apps there’s no soul or human connection I love these guys

title: Scam
review: After you sign up, the free trail disclosure pops up but they won’t tell you how much they’re charging which is a scam in itself.

title: Awesome!
review: I love this app so far its so sweet and simple to use not like other apps that pressure you and presumably don’t teach you!!

title: Thoughtful and helpful
review: Frankly I found the app thoughtful and helpful. I signed up for the 7 day free trial, but I uninstalled it after one day because I enjoyed it so much, I didn’t want to miss it when it ended. I’m unfortunately not in a financial position to pay a monthly fee right now, which is the only reason I cancelled. I downloaded it because I have really bad social anxiety and I’m not articulate verbally; I was hoping it could help me build the confidence to make friends and network in my career. In the short time I used it, it did feel like I could make strides to do so! It’s a very informative app and I like the structure of everything. Absolutely nothing wrong with it other than a personal financial issue on my end!

title: Cute
review: The art is so cute

title: Amazing
review: Love this app! Has amazing practice drills and activities that I need to enhance my communication skills!

title: Excellent resource
review: This application hit the nail on the head with exactly what I was struggling with. I recommend the app and will be revisiting lessons periodically myself.

title: Great app
review: Nice app help me touch up on some thing and the feed back at the end was amazing I will be using this app well in the future thank you!!

title: not sure
review: this app dissapointed me as it uses AI and goes through all of the personalization process before not letting you use it without having to start a trial then pay

title: We will charge you an in known amount!
review: As you go through a lengthy on boarding process the app stops to tell you that this is a free trial and we will charge you in a week. A gives you no information on WHAT  will be charged.  why do you expect me to agree to be charged with out listing a price?

title: Social Proof - Stock Image Profile
review: Feedback: I would have dropped off at the “Help others…” screen, because you used stock image profiles. You guys should use real users' pictures or no pictures at all. Will come back to update my rating when I use the app.

title: Recommend
review: Love it

title: Amazing Eloquence Training
review: I downloaded wellspoken to get better at public speaking. I noticed that after a few days of usage, my enunciation and pacing greatly improved. Also showed it to my mom, who wanted to better her eloquence in English to sound more American, and she loves it. Highly recommend!

title: Something fishy
review: This app appears to be identical to another speech therapy app that I downloaded, except with minor changes in color and style. I would suspect that these apps are all the same underlying product, but with different user interfaces overlaid in order to cynically rake in as much money as possible.

title: Practice works
review: Just a great app: customized practice, coaching suggestions, and solid courses.

title: Beware
review: This was a really long set up process to then find out it was only a 7 day free trial. Not a strong “articulation” process.

title: Frustrated
review: i HATE when apps waste 30 mins of your time with time consuming baseless “personalizing” questions that are simply there to tire you out by the time it asks u for your money. And for that reason alone i hate this app and will never use. So manipulative and dishonest. I probably would have paid for a subscription if you hadn’t sent me down a long pointless path and wasted my time.

title: Very helpful, fun, and easy to use
review: Must try if you’re interested in improving your articulation skills

title: Price
review: This app is not free and waits until the end to tell you

title: Brevity & clarity
review: Wellspoken has noticeably improved my vocabulary, clarity, and brevity. I’m more precise with word choice, more organized in how I express ideas, and less likely to ramble. It feels like practical, real-time coaching that translates directly into clearer, sharper communication.

title: I Have Been Looking For This!
review: I have been looking for something to help improve my surface lexicon. I'm trying to speak like a leader. So far I'm enjoying it. I'm on trial period. If this goes well, I will definitely continue. Hope we get more words and phrases. If somehow there could be categories too like lexicon for travel, office, casual etc that might help. Please keep improving this app. This is amazing!

title: Subscription required
review: Can’t use the app without paying

title: Well thought through app
review: The set up shows that they care about us reaching our goals. Everything is research based & I appreciated seeing citations throughout the onboarding flow.

title: My favorite app
review: This app does everything it says it will, and more I love the way this app is built. It has helped me with my speaking and creating better content for social media, as well as communicating with my peers and his family.

title: Review prompt too soon
review: You’re asked me to leave a review before actually trying the app. Therefore, I am leaving an average review because I have not had the chance to try the app’s features.

title: Poor Customer Service
review: I have reached out for feedback on two separate occasions without a response. Horrible customer service and many grammatical errors interfere with the lessons. They also only have five types of jobs for mock interviews and not a single option for sales, sales manager, or general manager.

title: Useless
review: Can’t use any features unless you pay. I despise apps like this. They claim to really want to help you but won’t let you do ANYTHING unless you pay up. Hypocritical and not worth the time.

title: It works
review: I tried other apps like Speako and Vocal Image, not only did they charge higher than this app, but they also didn’t work for me. This app was THE app that actually improved my speech and measured my improvements over time 🔥🔥

title: Clean interface and good content
review: The app gives a personalised plan for how you can speak based a pretty intensive set of questions. It then gives you multiple areas and lesson plans you can focus on to improve your confidence in speaking. The app is clean and the design alone is worth the premium price. Thanks Wellspoken!

title: Wonderful application
review: I loved using this app for communication skills improvement. Thinking out loud feature is awesome

title: Great app
review: Could I perhaps get a month free lol?

title: Amazing!
review: I love this app’s User experience, lessons and especially the Echo AI. I felt more confident when I was practicing for an interview and I love the small scenarios.

title: Fixed my speech, got promoted at FAANG
review: I am a very technical engineer who’s always done a good job building and contributing to my team. But my issue is that I am bad with public speaking and articulating my thoughts in meetings. Got so much bad feedback and it was what held me back from promo. After using this app for 5 months, I got promoted. Manager saying a drastic improvement in how I speak in meetings

title: Pleasantly Surprised
review: Lots of features and polish. Great work, Liam!

title: Love it!
review: I love this app! Lots of useful practice with great feedback, as well as informative reading materials. I’ve been trying to improve my verbal English skills to get promotion at work. Hopefully this helps!

title: From Freezing to Fluency
review: Impromptu speaking is something I need to work on. It’s like as soon as I asked a question I freeze. I can feel my confidence building through the drills and quick feedback. The Progress. Playground introduced me to this app via Instagram. I truly believe that if I practice daily I will improve my verbal fluency and deepen my lexicon.

title: Best Communication Application
review: As an early user, I love how this application is helping me improve my communication. It’s helping me improve my vocabulary by replacing everyday words and phrases with ones I do not use so often. There are so many drills that help you improve in many different aspects of everyday communication. This is definitely the app to get if you want to show up differently in leadership roles, presentations, and even a Ted talk if you’re into that. I can’t wait to see this application grow.

title: No free option, should mention that
review: No free option, you should mention that before someone wants to install your app. 1 star.

title: Surprised. In the best way.
review: The app seemed to have been created with the genuine mission to serve the user. Every step you feel cared for and supported in this development journey. This is crucial because this might be a time when you are extra critical of yourself. I truly feel comfortable practicing and I get the feeling of low stakes. I’m sure, as time goes on, I’m going to be excited to push myself out of my comfort zone. Maybe move away from low stake practice… This app seemed to have been created with your progress in mind every step of the way. I hope you exceed your expectations for yourself while using this app. Good luck!!

title: 11/10 recommended for people with anxiety surrounding public speaking
review: I wish I had found out about this app sooner! I’ve always struggled with public speaking to the point where even participating in class discussions sometimes feels too overwhelming. After using this app I’ve noticed a positive shift in confidence when speaking. The exercises and drills are all very helpful and I can’t wait to get through all of the modules!!

title: Nah
review: You’re forced into a free trial instead of seeing what the app has to offer first. Such a waste.

title: Much needed app!
review: Always sucked at public speaking and articulating my thoughts well in professional setting but this app def helped me improve even in interviews

title: Echo is amazing!!
review:
I use less of the practices but more of the echo modes. It is so nice to have a communication coach that helps you talk out your thoughts and ideas. It really helped me unravel some of my decisions and why I think certain things. 

I also really like the mock interview feature and the feedback that I received afterwards.

As for the actual practices, I honestly didn’t feel like doing them. I am quite lazy haha

title: HIGHLY RECOMMEND
review: I highly recommend this app. As someone who is shy, my speaking skills aren’t always fully developed and this app has made me more confident and is such good practice. Worth it!

title: Useful but has potential
review: It has been really helpful in practicing speaking. I’m not sure about how much I’ve improved, but just practicing daily has made a difference. Speaking is a skill that takes time and the daily practices is a great reminder to be intentional while talking so I’m getting better at it. One thing I wish it had more of is daily conversations. Many of the practices are about random topics and while it’s still helpful but I feel like if they were more conversational and about completely random topics, it would be more helpful

title: Wonderful app!
review: I’ve been using this app for a little over a week now, and I’ve got to say it is definitely making me feel a bit more confident! Though, I think there is some room for improvement. The hardest part for me was to use the app consistently, and I wish the app was a little bit more guided. Right now, I have to spend effort trying to remember to do this app. If there are any way you can make it simpler to just practice? I think that’d be wonderful. Overall I think this is going in the right direction!

title: Practical, simple, and it works!
review: This app has been such a pleasant surprise. I didn’t expect much at first, but it’s actually made a noticeable difference in how clearly and confidently I speak. The exercises are simple but effective, and it’s easy to stay consistent. Highly recommend if you’ve ever felt self-conscious about how you communicate.

title: Love this app!!
review:
I was honestly pretty skeptical since I’ve struggled with this my entire life, but after putting some consistency in this app I can say that I feel much more confident in my abilities! 

Would love some more practice modes to gamify the experience!
